creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The port is imported with some changes include: 

- Define RESTRICTED in the Makefile as this software cannot be  
redistributed or used for commercial purpose without registration. 

- Define what seems to be the correct master site as one defined  in 
the submitted Makefile didn't have the DISTFILE. 

- Install doc files that have information on copyright and registration. 

- Various style corrections. 

Except for the style corrections, all these things should be taken 
care of before the submission by the maintainer.
